briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether watchdog stopping is supported.
Macro for creating an instance of the WDT driver.

detaileddescription.para:
This configuration sets up WDT with the following options:
run when CPU is in SLEEP mode, pause when in HALT mode
reload value: 2000 ms

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* nrfx_wdt_event_handler_t) (nrf_wdt_event_t event_type, uint32_t requests, void *p_context)
memberdef.name: nrfx_wdt_event_handler_t

parameterdescription.para: WDT event.

Value of the request status register. Bits that have been set can be used to determine which RR (Reload Request) register was the reason for timeout event. Valid only when NRF_WDT_EVENT_TIMEOUT is passed in event_type.
User context.

briefdescription.para: Function for initializing the WDT driver instance.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the driver instance structure.
Pointer to the structure with the initial configuration. NULL if configuration is to be skipped and will be done later using nrfx_wdt_reconfigure.
Event handler provided by the user. Ignored when NRFX_WDT_CONFIG_NO_IRQ option is enabled.
User context passed in event handler. Ignored when NRFX_WDT_CONFIG_NO_IRQ option is enabled.
Initialization was successful.
The driver is already initialized.

briefdescription.para: Function for uninitializing the WDT driver instance.

detaileddescription.para: The instance can be uninitialized only when not running.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the driver instance structure.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the WDT driver instance is initialized.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the driver instance structure.
Instance is already initialized.
Instance is not initialized.
Pointer to the driver instance structure.
Pointer to the structure with the initial configuration.
Reconfiguration was successful.
The watchdog is already active.
The watchdog is uninitialized.

briefdescription.para: Function for allocating a watchdog channel.

simplesect.para: This function can not be called after nrfx_wdt_enable.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the driver instance structure.
ID of granted channel.
The channel was successfully allocated.
There is no available channel to be used.

briefdescription.para: Function for deallocating all previously allocated watchdog channels.

simplesect.para: This function can be called when watchdog is stopped, that is before nrfx_wdt_enable() or after nrfx_wdt_stop().

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the driver instance structure.

simplesect.para: After calling this function the watchdog is started, so the user needs to feed all allocated watchdog channels to avoid reset. At least one watchdog channel must be allocated.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the driver instance structure.

detaileddescription.para: Function feeds all allocated watchdog channels.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the driver instance structure.

briefdescription.para: Function for feeding an individual watchdog channel.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the driver instance structure.
ID of watchdog channel.
Pointer to the driver instance structure.
Watchdog has been successfully stopped.
Configuration does not allow for stopping the watchdog.
Pointer to the driver instance structure.

briefdescription.para: Function for returning a requested task address for the WDT driver module.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the driver instance structure.
One of the WDT tasks.

briefdescription.para: Function for returning a requested event address for the WDT driver module.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the driver instance structure.
One of the WDT events.
